contentBlocks.original:
समस्त जन कल्याणे निरतं करुणामयम् ।
नमामि चिन्मयं देवं सद्गुरुं ब्रह्मविद्वरम्॥७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
samasta jana kalyāṇe nirataṃ karuṇāmayam .
namāmi cinmayaṃ devaṃ sadguruṃ brahmavidvaram..7..
contentBlocks.translation: I salute, Shri Chinmaya, the noble teacher, the best of the knowers of Brahman (the highest Reality), and who full of compassion, is ever engaged in the welfare of all people.
contentBlocks.meanings: समस्त (samasta) – all; जन (jana) – people; कल्याणे (kalyāṇe) – in welfare; निरतं (nirataṃ) – engaged; करुणामयम् (karuṇāmayam) – full of compassion; नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; चिन्मयं (cinmayaṃ) – Chinmaya; देवं (devaṃ) – divine; सद्गुरुं (sadguruṃ) – noble teacher (sat:true | guruṃ:teacher); ब्रह्मविद्वरम् (brahmavidvaram) – best of knowers of Brahman (brahma:Brahman | vid:knower | varam:best);
